verses.text: Paisan Pawi hun a tun' ding ni guk in a sap ni-in sihna panin a thawhsak Lazaras a ten'na Bethany khua-ah va tung hi
Amaute in nitak an na vak uh a, Lazaras ahih leh Jesuh tawh an ne-in tukhawmin, Martha pen anpia-in a manlah hi
Tua laitakin Mary in a manpha mahmah nard sathau namtui thawl khat hong paipih a, Jesuh' khe a nuhkhit ciangin a sam tawh a nulsak hi. Tua innsung khempeuh sathau namtui gim hong nam hi
Tua laitakin Jesuh' nungzuite sung panin amah a lehhek ding Judas Iskariot in
“Bang hangin hih sathau namtui ngun peek za thumin kizuakin a sumte mizawngte tungah kipiazaw lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Hih bangin kam a pauna pen mizawngte a khualna hang hilo a, amah sumkem ahih manin a sumte gu-in a ututin a zang zelpa ahihna hang hizaw hi
Tua ahih manin Jesuh in, “Bangmah cih se dah un! Ama neih laite zong ka kivui cianga dingin kemsak hoh un
Mizawngte pen note tawh hong omkhawm niloh ding a, kei ka hih leh note tawh ka hong omkhawm tawntung kei ding hi,” a ci hi.
Bethany khua-ah Jesuh a omna thu a zak uh ciangin mihon tampi hong pai uh hi. Jesuh a mu nuamin hong pai hi bek lo uh a, Jesuh in sihna panin a thawhsakkik Lazaras zong a mu nuam kawm uh ahi hi
Lazaras' hangin Jew mi tampite in amau' makaite taisanin Jesuh um uh ahih manin siampi liante in Lazaras zong thah a sawm uh hi.
A zing ciangin Paisan Pawi a siim mihonpite in Jerusalem khua-ah Jesuh hong paina ding thu a za uh hi

Tua ahih manin amah a dawn dingin Jerusalem panin mihonpi paikhia-in nisuh hiangte tawikawmin, “Pasian phat un! Pasian in Topa' min tawh hong paipa thupha pia ta hen! Pasian in Israel Kumpipa thupha pia ta hen!” ci-in a kiko uh hi
Lai Siangtho sungah, “Zion khua mite aw, lau kei un. En un, na kumpipa uh hong pai a, lano tungah hong tuang hi,” ci-in a kigelh mah bangin Jesuh in lano khat mu ahih manin tua lano tungah a tuang hi

Tua hun laitakin a nungzuite in hih thu a khiatna theilo uh hi. Ahi zongin Pasian' pianzia nei-in Jesuh a thawhkik khit ciangin Lai Siangtho in amah a gen ahihna leh ama-a' dingin hih bangin a piang ahihna thu a nungphawk uh hi
Jesuh in han sung panin Lazaras samin, sihna panin a thawhsakkik a mu mihonte in tua thu mah gen belin a nei uh hi
Jesuh in tua bang na lamdang lian a bawlna thu mihonte in za khin uh ahih manin amah a dawn dingin a pai uh hi
Tua ciangin Farisi mite khatlekhat kiho uh a, “Bangmah i cihzo het kei hi. En un, mi khempeuh in amah a zui khinta uh ahi hi,” a kici uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Grik Mi Pawlkhat in Jesuh Zong

verses.text: Pawi hunsungin Pasian bia dingin Jerusalem khua-ah a hong pai mite lakah Grik mi pawlkhat a om uh hi
Galilee gam Bethsaida khuami Filip kiangah amaute hong pai-in, “Sia aw, kote in zong Jesuh ka mu nuam uh hi,” ci-in a gen uh ciangin
Filip in Andru kiangah a gen hi. Tua ciangin Andru leh Filip paikhawmin Jesuh kiangah a gen uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Mihing Tapa in Pasian' pianzia a ngahding hun hong tungta hi
A mantakin ci lehang, mangbuhhum tang khat leilakah kituhin si masa kei leh tang khat bek mah hi ngitnget hi; ahi zongin si masa leh tang tampi tak hong nei thei hi
Tua ahih manin hih leitung nuntakna a itte in a nuntakna taktak taanlawh ding a, hih leitung nuntakna a itlote in nuntakna taktak nei tawntung ding hi
Ka nasemte keima omna-ah a omtheihna dingin ka na a sem nuam peuhmah in kei hong zui ding uh a, ka Pa in ka na a sem mite a pahtawi ding hi,” a ci hi.

Tua khit ciangin Jesuh in, “Tu-in ka lunggim mahmah hi. Bangcih ding ka hi hiam? ‘Pa aw, hih hun tawh hong kipelhsak in,’ ci ding ka hi hiam? Tua bang cih ding lah hih bang a thuak ding mahin a hong pai ka hi hi
Pa aw, nangma min thangsak ta in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin vantung panin aw khat hong ging a, “Ka thangsakzo a, khatvei ka thangsakkik ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua kiima ding mihonte in a awging za uh a, “Vanging bang hi,” a ci uh hi. Pawlkhatte in, “Vantung mi in amah hopih hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Hih awging pen keima-a' ding ngaihsutna hilo a, note-a' ding ngaihsutna-in hong ging hizaw hi
Tu-in leitung thukhen ding hun hong tungta a, hih leitung a ukpa kilawnkhia ding hi
Leilak panin kei hong kikhai toh ciangin ka kiangah mi khempeuh ka kai ding hi,” a ci hi
(Hih bangin a gen ciangin ama sihna dingzia a genna ahi hi
Tua ciangin mihonte in, “Khrih nungta tawntung ding hi, ci-in Thukham sungah kigen hi. Bang hangin Mihing Tapa kikhaito ding ci na hi hiam? Hih Mihing Tapa kua ahi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin

Jesuh in, “Note kiangah tawmvei sung khuavak hong omlai ding hi. Khuamial sungah a pai mi in a paina mun theilo ahih manin khuamial in note hong phaklohna dingin khuavak na neih sungun na gamtat ngei uh zom paisuak un
Khuavak mite na suahtheihna dingun khuavak na neih hun sungun tua khuavak um un,” a ci hi.
Amaute' muhin Jesuh in hih na lamdang khempeuh a bawl hangin amaute in umlo uh hi
Kamsang Isaiah in, “Topa aw, kua in ka thugente um a, Topa' vangliatna kua tungah kilak ahi hiam?” ci-in a genna thu a tun'na ding ahi hi
Tua ahih manin amaute in um nuamlo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Isaiah mah in
“Amaute' natna ka damsak lohna dingin a mit un muloin, a lungsim un a theih theihlohna dingun amaute' mit ka tawsak a, a lungsim uh ka mawlsak hi, Pasian in ci hi,” ci-in zong na gen lai hi
Isaiah in Jesuh' neih Pasian' pianzia mu ahih manin hih bangin thu a gen ahi hi
Tua bang hita se leh Jew mi ulian tampi in Jesuh a um uh hi. Ahi zongin Farisi mite in kikhopna inn panin a hawlkhiat ding lau uh ahih manin a kilangin genkhia ngamlo uh hi
Pasian' pahtak ding sangin mite' pahtak ding utzaw uh ahih manin a tuaci om ahi uh hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh nakpi takin kiko a, “Kei hong um khempeuh in kei bek hong um hiloin kei hong sawlpa zong a um ahi hi
Kei hong mu khempeuh in kei hong sawlpa zong a mu ahi hi
Kei hong um mi khempeuh, khuamial sungah a om nawnlohna dingun leitung khuavak bangin ka hong pai hi
Ka thugenna za napi-in a zuilo mite tungah thu ka khen kei ding hi. Leitung mite mawhsakin thukhen dingin a hong pai ka hi kei a, a honkhia dingin a hong pai ka hizaw hi
Kei hong nialin ka thugen a sanglo mite in thukhen ding khat nei uh hi. Nitawp ni ciangin keima thugente pen amaute' thukhen ding ahi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh keima utthu tawh thu a mawkgen ka hi kei a, kei hong sawl Pa Pasian in ka gen ding thuteng a hong piak ahi hi
Gen dingin a hong sawl thute in nuntak tawntung a piangsak thei ahihna thu ka thei hi. Tua ahih manin Pa in gen dingin a hong sawlteng bek a gen ka hi hi,” a ci hi.
